diagnoses.name: Nonruptured cerebral aneurysm
diagnoses.evidence_span: detection of a nonruptured cerebral aneurysm on imaging studies

diagnoses.name: Essential hypertension
diagnoses.evidence_span: significant past medical history including essential hypertension

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: significant past medical history including essential hypertension, hyperlipidemia

diagnoses.name: Malignant neoplasm of the breast
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior malignant neoplasm of the breast

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ
diagnoses.evidence_span: pt developed a postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ following the endovascular intervention

diagnoses.name: Accidental puncture and laceration of a circulatory structure during procedure
diagnoses.evidence_span: accidental puncture and laceration of a circulatory structure that occurred during the procedure

diagnoses.name: Hemothorax
diagnoses.evidence_span: These complications led to development of hemothorax requiring close monitoring and management

diagnoses.name: Acute posthemorrhagic anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: The hemorrhage resulted in acute posthemorrhagic anemia necessitating transfusion support

diagnoses.name: Cerebral edema
diagnoses.evidence_span: pt developed significant cerebral edema in the immediate postoperative period

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural hypotension
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient also experienced postprocedural hypotension requiring vasopressor and antihypertensive agent titration

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: pt developed postprocedural heart failure following the surgical intervention

diagnoses.name: Acute diastolic congestive heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: compounded by preexisting acute diastolic congestive heart failure

diagnoses.name: Aphasia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Speech evaluation revealed aphasia related to the cerebrovascular event and swelling

diagnoses.name: Chest pain
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient also complained of chest pain during hospitalization

diagnoses.name: Hypokalemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Electrolyte disturbances, particularly hypokalemia and hypomagnesemia, were identified and corrected

diagnoses.name: Hypomagnesemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Electrolyte disturbances, particularly hypokalemia and hypomagnesemia, were identified and corrected

procedures.name: Restriction of left internal carotid artery with intraluminal device via percutaneous approach
procedures.evidence_span: pt underwent percutaneous restriction of the left internal carotid artery and intracranial artery using intraluminal devices

procedures.name: Restriction of intracranial artery with intraluminal device via percutaneous approach
procedures.evidence_span: pt underwent percutaneous restriction of the left internal carotid artery and intracranial artery using intraluminal devices

medications.name: Furosemide
medications.evidence_span: Furosemide 10 mg IV daily (or as needed for volume status)

medications.name: Dexamethasone
medications.evidence_span: Dexamethasone 2 mg PO daily (taper per neurosurgery recommendations)

medications.name: Bisacodyl
medications.evidence_span: Bisacodyl 10 mg PO at bedtime as needed

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 325-650 mg PO Q6H as needed for pain

medications.name: Magnesium sulfate
medications.evidence_span: Magnesium sulfate supplementation as directed by primary team

chief_complaint: Nonruptured cerebral aneurysm requiring interventional neuroradiology procedures
